rule.match: Packet socket was created in a container
rule.description: Kubernetes container created packet socket, possible Nmap or network reconnaissance activity

rule.match: Suspicious user management command executed in container
rule.description: Kubernetes container executed user or group management command

rule.match: Container accessed host filesystem through mounted hostPath
rule.description: Kubernetes container accessed host filesystem through mounted hostPath
Kubernetes container redirected shell stdin/stdout to network connection, possible reverse shell
